entities.name: Strategist
entities.context: A role activated for decision-making and pattern extraction.

entities.name: Operator
entities.context: Determines the dominant need in the process.

entities.name: Level Upper
entities.context: A role related to the Operator.

entities.name: Researcher
entities.context: Role that initiates the strategic process.

entities.name: Writer
entities.context: Handles polished communication from the Strategist.

entities.name: Debugger
entities.context: Part of the typical chain in the knowledge system.

relationships.context: Strategist hands off implementation to Builder.
Strategist hands polished content to Writer.
Strategist may conclude the chain by handing off to Operator.
Strategist works in conjunction with Debugger after building.
